title: 'Hostile missiles, drones intercepted': Kuwait, Bahrain come under Iranian attack; watch
content:
Kuwait and Bahrain reportedly came under attack.
*   The assault involved hostile missiles and drones, attributed to Iran.
*   Both nations successfully intercepted the incoming projectiles.

title: Why did Supreme Court back curbs on online gaming? | Explained
content:
The Supreme Court has supported or backed curbs (restrictions) on online gaming.
*   The headline raises a question about the reasons or rationale behind this decision.
*   The accompanying content promises to explain *why* the Supreme Court took this stance.

title: Amarinder meets Shah, Nadda amid exit rumours
content:
Amarinder Singh held meetings with top BJP leaders Amit Shah and J.P. Nadda.
*   These discussions occurred amidst widespread rumors that Singh may be exiting his current party.
*   The meetings fuel speculation about his future political moves and potential alignment with the BJP.

title: Officials to inspect annadhanam scheme at Tiruchendur temple
content:
Officials are scheduled to conduct an inspection.
*   The inspection will focus on the 'annadhanam' scheme, which provides free food.
*   This review will take place at the Tiruchendur temple.
